race.description: Kooza - Now On At Flemington Hcp (Bm84)
race.comment: Looks another nice race for ROSA AOTEAROA (13) who has come back very well, winning both starts in good style. He worked early last start at Bendigo and proved too tough up on speed. This is harder but he drops in weight again and can measure up. EL SOLEADO (1) resumes off a long spell. He finished a narrow second in this race last year under 61.5kg, beating subsequent stakes winner Marble Nine. He's huge odds here and might be worth something small. GREAT MAXIMUS (2) is racing consistently and should be right there despite a jump in the weights. MARKDEL (11) was beaten less than a length last start after kicking off the campaign with back-to-back wins. Goes well at this longer distance. Contender.
